title: SIN instance records accumulating without rotation -- add to ReportRetention
description: sin_registry/ stores 24 definition files (SIN-PATTERN-*.json, SEMI-SIN-*.json) plus scanner output writes SIN instance records to ~REPORTS/SINScanner/ and ~REPORTS/SemiSin/. The ReportRetention cron task handles ~REPORTS/ subdirectories but the sin_registry instance logs (if any) are not included. Add sin_registry/ log cleanup (if applicable) to Invoke-ReportRetention. Also confirm SINScanner/SemiSin report dirs have retention configured correctly (threshold: 30 days to archive zip).
notes: 24 total SIN patterns (18 blocking + 6 advisory). Retention = archive dirs >30 days to zip. See TASK-ReportRetention in cron schedule.
